description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have two jobs: pytest and pytest_mongomock, both running on ubuntu-latest. The pytest job should set up a MongoDB service, check out the repository, set up Python 3.8, install dependencies, and run pytest on the fireworks module. The pytest_mongomock job should check out the repository, set up Python 3.8, install dependencies with mongomock, set up a mongomock server store, and run pytest on the fireworks module excluding tests that require MongoDB.
